CREATE TABLE test_numbers (id INT, value FLOAT);
INSERT INTO test_numbers (id, value) VALUES (4, CAST('3.14' AS FLOAT));
INSERT INTO test_numbers (id, value) VALUES (5, CAST('not_a_double' AS FLOAT));
SELECT id, isdouble(CAST(5 AS FLOAT)) FROM test_numbers WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, isdouble(value) FROM (SELECT value FROM test_numbers WHERE value > 0) AS subquery;
SELECT t.id, isdouble(t.value) FROM test_numbers t JOIN (SELECT id FROM test_numbers WHERE value < 10) AS subquery ON t.id = subquery.id;
SELECT id FROM test_numbers WHERE isdouble(value) = 1 AND value = (SELECT MAX(value) FROM test_numbers);
SELECT id, isdouble(value) FROM test_numbers WHERE value IN (SELECT value FROM test_numbers WHERE isdouble(value) = 1);
SELECT id, isdouble(value) FROM (SELECT id, value FROM test_numbers WHERE isdouble(value) = 1 UNION SELECT id, 0 AS value FROM test_numbers WHERE isdouble(value) = 0) AS combined;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_numbers WHERE isdouble(value) = 0;
SELECT id FROM test_numbers WHERE isdouble(CAST(value AS FLOAT)) = 1 ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 5;
